_info.text: Configure update intervals and polling behavior for OpenF1 API.

enableDynamicPolling.label: Enable dynamic polling
enableDynamicPolling.help: Automatically switch between fast and slow polling based on race schedule

updateIntervalNormal.label: Update interval (normal)
updateIntervalNormal.help: Update interval in seconds when no race session is active (default: 1 hour = 3600s)

updateIntervalRace.label: Update interval (race day)
updateIntervalRace.help: Update interval in seconds during active race sessions (default: 10s). OpenF1 rate limit: 3 req/s, 30 req/min - 10s is safe!
